introSection: Flagermusen is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster located at Fårup Sommerland in Blokhus, Nordjylland, Denmark. Flagermusen is Danish for Bat.
fullText:
Flagermusen is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster located at Fårup Sommerland in Blokhus, Nordjylland, Denmark. Flagermusen is Danish for Bat.



Brown track and supports.
